title: Gen AI Lead Developer
company_focus: IT services and consulting with AI/ML solutions
description:
Design end-to-end AI/ML architecture including data
ingestion, model training, inference, and monitoring systems
• Define technical standards, best practices, and governance
frameworks for AI/ML implementations • Architect scalable
GenAI solutions including LLM deployments, RAG systems, and
multimodal AI applications • Lead architectural reviews and
provide technical guidance to development teams • Design
integration patterns between AI services and existing
enterprise systems • Evaluate and recommend AI/ML
technologies, platforms, and vendor solutions • Create
technical roadmaps aligned with business objectives and AI
strategy • Assess technical feasibility of AI use cases and
provide effort estimations • 8+ years of experience in
software architecture with 3+ years focused on AI/ML systems
• Strong experience with cloud platforms (Azure preferred)
and distributed systems architecture • Deep understanding of
LLM architectures, transformer models, and generative AI
patterns • Experience with MLOps tools and practices (Azure
ML, Docker, Kubernetes) • Proficiency in Python and
familiarity with AI/ML frameworks (PyTorch, TensorFlow,
Hugging Face) • Experience with Azure AI Foundry, LangChain,
LangGraph, and Copilot Studio • Strong technical leadership
and mentoring capabilities • Experience with microservices
architecture, API design, and event-driven systems
responsibilities: Design end-to-end AI/ML architecture including data ingestion, model training, inference, and monitoring systems
Architect scalable GenAI solutions including LLM deployments, RAG systems, and multimodal AI applications
Define technical standards, best practices, and governance frameworks for AI/ML implementations
Lead architectural reviews and provide technical guidance to development teams
Design integration patterns between AI services and existing enterprise systems
Evaluate and recommend AI/ML technologies, platforms, and vendor solutions
Create technical roadmaps aligned with business objectives and AI strategy
Assess technical feasibility of AI use cases and provide effort estimations
use_cases: Enterprise LLM deployments and inference systems
Multimodal AI applications combining text, image, and other data modalities
Integration of AI services with enterprise systems via microservices and event-driven architecture
Scalable GenAI solution delivery for business clients
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly designing and architecting GenAI
solutions including LLM deployments, RAG systems, and
multimodal AI applications. The lead developer works hands-
on with LLM architectures, transformer models, and
generative AI patterns, making this an ai-first role focused
on building and deploying AI systems.
